machine.name: localai/session_health_context
machine.description: Bistable flip-flop that carries the last health state classification forward through PE perceptual space persist semantics. Reads the personal_health_baseline one-hot output at [190:194] and writes a sticky carry to [202:206]. Structurally identical to session_rag_context: each of the four sequences fires when its health state bit is HIGH, and when no health push occurs in a cycle (agent tool call, idle turn), no sequence fires — PE carry-forward holds [202:206] unchanged, so the health state persists across the entire conversation without re-querying the RE.

metadata.author: localAIStack health bridge
metadata.eventSpace: 4D health state signal at [190:194]: [thriving, balanced, watch, attention]  ← reads personal_health_baseline output
metadata.outputSpace: 4D carry vector at [202:206]: [last_thriving, last_balanced, last_watch, last_attention]
metadata.bistableNote: SET: one of four sequences fires when personal_health_baseline writes a new health state to [190:194] → writes 1.0 to the matching carry element, 0.0 to others. HOLD: no sequence fires (no health push this cycle) → PE carry-forward preserves [202:206] unchanged. The four guards partition the health state space; mutual exclusivity is guaranteed by personal_health_baseline upstream (one-hot output).
metadata.whyThisExists: get_current_health_state() polls the RE on every chat request. The carry machine makes the health state available in the assembled perceptual space on every push without extra HTTP calls — downstream Python code reads [202:206] from the push response rather than making a separate GET /api/perceptual-simulation/state call. Falls back to the live read only when the carry is still cold (no push yet this session).

sequences.name: Carry: last health state was thriving

metadata.description: Fires when personal_health_baseline asserts thriving (ps[190] ≥ 0.5). Sets last_thriving carry HIGH, clears others.

metadata.name: SESS_HEALTH_THRIVING
metadata.description: element[0]: ps[190] thriving HIGH (GTE ≥0.5); elements[1-3]: wildcards. Fires only when personal_health_baseline wrote thriving this cycle.

sequences.name: Carry: last health state was balanced

metadata.description: Fires when personal_health_baseline asserts balanced (ps[191] ≥ 0.5). Sets last_balanced carry HIGH, clears others.

metadata.name: SESS_HEALTH_BALANCED
metadata.description: element[1]: ps[191] balanced HIGH; elements[0,2,3]: wildcards.

sequences.name: Carry: last health state was watch

metadata.description: Fires when personal_health_baseline asserts watch (ps[192] ≥ 0.5). Sets last_watch carry HIGH, clears others.

metadata.name: SESS_HEALTH_WATCH
metadata.description: element[2]: ps[192] watch HIGH; elements[0,1,3]: wildcards.

sequences.name: Carry: last health state was attention

metadata.description: Fires when personal_health_baseline asserts attention (ps[193] ≥ 0.5). Sets last_attention carry HIGH, clears others.

metadata.name: SESS_HEALTH_ATTENTION
metadata.description: element[3]: ps[193] attention HIGH; elements[0,1,2]: wildcards.

inputSequences.name: Thriving push — carry latches thriving
inputSequences.description: personal_health_baseline fired thriving this cycle. sess-health-thriving fires, writing [1,0,0,0] to carry. On the next push with no health sensors active, no sequence fires and PE carry-forward holds [1,0,0,0].

inputSequences.name: Watch push — carry latches watch
inputSequences.description: personal_health_baseline fired watch. sess-health-watch fires. Carry persists as [0,0,1,0] until the next health push.

inputSequences.name: Bistable hold — between health pushes
inputSequences.pattern: all zeros (no health push this cycle)
inputSequences.description: No health state signals active — the API is processing a chat or agent turn with no health sensor update. None of the four sequences fires. OR arbiter produces no output. PE carry-forward preserves whichever carry was last written.

metadata.expectedOutput: no output (PE carry-forward preserves prior state)
